description_long: This is a modern, expansive bungalow set on a landscaped plot with a flat green roof and large horizontal windows. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes connected by a central section, with the front facade featuring wide glass panels and a terrace area. The building is partially embedded into a sloped terrain, with the rear elevation showing a more solid, windowless wall and a driveway leading to a garage. The side views reveal the depth of the green roof and the integration of the building into the landscape, with minimalistic landscaping and paved access paths. The materials appear to be primarily concrete, glass, and metal, with green roofing and some wooden accents. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, green roofing, and a minimalist, landscaped setting. The structure features two main volumes connected by a central section and is partially embedded in sloped terrain.
description_view_0: Front view showing wide glass panels, terrace, and the main entrance with landscaped lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the green roof, driveway, and garage entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view with solid walls, fewer windows, and the building's integration into the sloped terrain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the green roof and paved access paths.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large horizontal windows on the front facade
